headline: How The United Rentals (URI) Story Is Shifting With New AI Tools And Mixed Analyst Targets
summary: Analysts recently nudged their fair value estimate for United Rentals slightly higher, from US$989.89 to US$991.39, highlighting a very modest reset in where models cluster. That small move sits against a mixed backdrop, with some firms lifting targets and others trimming them, as they rework assumptions and debate how much upside remains in the shares at current levels. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative could shape the way you track sentiment and research on United...
